name: Governor-elect Jim Justice
subject: Transition Update - Chief of Staff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for Governor
body:
Justice Names Nick Casey Chief of Staff

Today, Governor-elect Jim Justice announced that Nick Casey will serve as his chief of staff. Casey is a lifelong West Virginian who works as an attorney and a certified public accountant (CPA) in Charleston. He brings a mix of private sector experience and knowledge of state government to his new role as Justice’s top aide.

Nick Casey was previously the managing partner of Lewis, Glasser, Casey, & Rollins. In 2013, he was elected treasurer of the American Bar Association. Before that, Casey was the president of the West Virginia State Bar Association and the Kanawha County Bar Association. He earned his Accounting degree from the University of Kentucky and his law degree from the West Virginia University College of Law.

Casey has always played an active role in many local organizations, including the St. Francis Hospital Board of Directors, the West Virginia Catholic Diocese, Project Hope, Rae of Hope, and the Appalachian Service Project. Over the years he worked very closely with the state legislature, state agencies, and many other West Virginia leaders. He is also currently an adjunct professor at the University of Charleston.

“Nick Casey is as genuine as they come, and will be a tremendous asset to my administration and the people of West Virginia,” said Governor-elect Jim Justice. “He has the experience and the background to really help me transform our state. Nick knows how to bring people together, and will help lead my team in taking West Virginia to new heights. Nick is a caring man who’s dedicated himself to helping others in need; he understands the true meaning of service.”

“It’s a real honor to serve the Governor-elect and the people of West Virginia in this new role,” said Nick Casey. “West Virginia has so much potential, and I am excited for this opportunity to help Jim Justice make our state number one. I’m working with Governor-elect Justice to fill our cabinet and transition team with West Virginia’s best and brightest.”

Casey served as the treasurer for the Justice campaign.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------
| Paid for by Justice for Governor. Public employees please disregard. |
------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Justice for Governor
PO Box 40027
Charleston WV 25364 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/6398912056447600640/3892098039871309824.

Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

name: catherine@dscc.org
subject: Friend, please welcome our new senators:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
I need you to know how our hard-fought victories will bring more diverse voices to the Senate. [](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee2e/2b07114c/43cf21f6/7364b205/2142403388/VEsH/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-our-new-senators?source=PT-20161205-Catherine_DS-ProsHV")
---
Friend -- We know the fights ahead to protect our progress won't be easy, but what gives me hope is that we'll face them with new, determined voices in the Senate.

This year, we elected four women who flipped two red seats, breaking major barriers along the way. **More women of color will serve in the Senate than ever before.**

**Friend, will you welcome our new women senators and congratulate them on their hard-fought victories?**

| **[](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee2e/2b07114c/43cf21f6/7364b205/2142403388/VEsE/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-our-new-senators?source=PT-20161205-Catherine_DS-ProsHV")**
---
Their unique perspectives will be at the table to address persistent challenges our communities face. **And they will effectively lead with personal experience, expanding how we hear and tackle issues that matter to millions of families.**

[**Friend, will you please join me in welcoming Tammy Duckworth, Kamala Harris, Maggie Hassan, and Catherine Cortez Masto to the most diverse Senate in history?**](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee2e/2b07114c/43cf21f6/7364b205/2142403388/VEsF/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/welcome-our-new-senators?source=PT-20161205-Catherine_DS-ProsHV")

Thank you for everything you do,

Catherine Algeri
DSCC Director of Marketing

A quick note on donations, Friend:

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/new-senators?refcode=DPE-20161205-Catherine_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee2e/2b07114c/43cf21f6/7364b207/2142403388/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee2e/2b07114c/43cf21f6/7364b206/2142403388/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ee2e/2b07114c/43cf21f6/7364b201/2142403388/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Thank you, friends. I just received a call from Governor McCrory conceding the race and congratulating me on becoming the 75th governor of North Carolina.
Thank you, friends. I just received a call from Governor McCrory conceding the race and congratulating me on becoming the 75th governor of North Carolina.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bb7/2fde7c66/43ae6b7d/15692ebd/683690155/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/victory-speech?utm_campaign=engg_victor_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_161205_engg_gq_victor_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Thank you, friends. I just received a call from Governor McCrory conceding the race and congratulating me on becoming the 75th governor of North Carolina. I'm proud to have received the support of so many who believe that we can come together to make a North Carolina that works for everyone. It will be the honor of my life to serve this great state. I also want to thank Governor McCrory and his wife Ann for their service to our state. While this was a divisive election season, I know there is still more that unites us than divides us. Together, we can make North Carolina the shining beacon in the south by investing in our schools, supporting working families and building a state that works for everyone. I'd like to thank all of the hardworking families in North Carolina, and I look forward to serving the greatest state in the country as your governor. **[We are holding a victory rally tomorrow night in Raleigh, and I would love it if you can make it. Please RSVP here.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bb7/2fde7c66/43ae6b7d/15692ebd/683690155/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/victory-speech?utm_campaign=engg_victor_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_161205_engg_gq_victor_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")** Kristin and I are so thankful for all of your support, Roy | | [**RSVP ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bb7/2fde7c66/43ae6b7d/15692ebd/683690155/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/victory-speech?utm_campaign=engg_victor_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_161205_engg_gq_victor_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---

* * *

Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
---

Roy Cooper for North Carolina
PO Box 10587
Raleigh NC 27605 United States

This email was sent to:
dpwillis67@gmail.com

To unsubscribe, go to:
[http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202bb7/2fde7c66/43ae6b7d/15692ebc/683690155/VEsC/ "http://act.roycooper.com/unsubscribe")

I'm proud to have received the support of so many who believe that we can come together to make a North Carolina that works for everyone. It will be the honor of my life to serve this great state. I also want to thank Governor McCrory and his wife Ann for their service to our state. While this was a divisive election season, I know there is still more that unites us than divides us. Together, we can make North Carolina the shining beacon in the south by investing in our schools, supporting working families and building a state that works for everyone. I'd like to thank all of the hardworking families in North Carolina, and I look forward to serving the greatest state in the country as your governor. "" Kristin and I are so thankful for all of your support, Roy | | "" * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 10587 Raleigh NC 27605 United States

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Fundraising freeze (please help)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Donald Trump and our Republican State Senate will have four months to roll back the clock. Help. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=OTk5MzkzNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Friend -- In just 46 days, a man who built his campaign on bigotry, racism, and sexism -- on harnessing the fears that divide us -- will take the oath of office. When we are faced with division and bigotry, we can't stop fighting. We can't give up. Now more than ever, we must defend the Washington values we hold dear. For my part, I'm going to continue fighting to strengthen our economy, make sure every child has access to a great education, and protect our environment -- and I will always stand up for women's reproductive rights, LGBTQ rights, and the diversity that makes Washington thrive. No matter what. But right now we're at a critical moment for our state and the progressive movement. In four days, we hit a legally mandated four-month long fundraising freeze. This means that Donald Trump will have four months to roll back the clock -- and I won't be able to raise a dime to fight back. **Now we have just four days to make sure my campaign has the resources it needs to stand up to the other side for the next four months. That 's why I'm asking for your help.** [**Can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help my campaign before it 's too late?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=OTk5MzkzNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&rt=0) _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=OTk5MzkzNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $25 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=OTk5MzkzNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $50 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=OTk5MzkzNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&rt=0)
---|---
| | [EXPRESS DONATE $100 »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=OTk5MzkzNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&rt=0)
---|---
**[Or, donate another amount.](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=OTk5MzkzNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&mt=2&rj=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&rt=0)**
Let's build the progressive movement we need to stop Trump together -- and let's do it before our legally mandated fundraising freeze.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTk5MzkzNgS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDQ1MDg1MQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
